basic_details.job_title: HNGU Teaching Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 17 Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: HNGU , Patan is recruiting 17 Assistant Professor posts across various departments, last date for online application 15 June 2026.

important_dates.shortlisting / screening test: To be notified on University website
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on University website

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the application processing fee through online mode only. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with minimum 55% marks (without grace marks) in the concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or equivalent from an accredited foreign university + NET/SLET/SET cleared OR Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations (2009/2016)
qualification.required_degree: Ph.D. from a foreign university ranked in Top 500 in QS/THE/ARWU rankings also qualifies
qualification.details: As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education 2018, and its amendments from time to time: | Option A: | Master's degree with 55% marks (without grace marks or rounding off), in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. PLUS: NET conducted by UGC/CSIR, or SLET/SET, or Ph.D. awarded as per UGC Minimum Standards Regulations (2009 or 2016). Candidates registered for Ph.D. prior to July 11, 2009 are exempt from NET/SLET/SET subject to fulfillment of conditions: Ph.D. awarded in regular mode, thesis evaluated by at least two external examiners, open viva voce conducted, two research papers published (at least one in a refereed journal), and at least two papers presented at UGC/ICSSR/CSIR-funded conferences. | Option B: | Ph.D. degree from a foreign university/institution ranked among the Top 500 in World University Rankings by QS, THE, or ARWU (Shanghai Jiao Tong University) at any time. | Marks Relaxation: | 5% relaxation (55% to 50%) at Master's level for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/Differently-abled candidates. 5% relaxation (55% to 50%) for Ph.D. holders who obtained their Master's degree prior to 19th September 1991. | As per Minimum Standards of Architectural Education Regulations, 2020 and amendments: | B.Arch. with minimum 60% marks and 3 years of relevant professional experience; OR B.Arch. + Master's degree in Architecture or allied subjects with minimum 60% marks at either level and 1 year of relevant professional experience.

selection_process: Selection for the post of Assistant Professor will be based on:
Stage 1 - Academic Score Shortlisting: Candidates will be shortlisted based on Academic Score as per Appendix II
subject to fulfilling all essential eligibility criteria. Shortlisting ratio is 1:15 (suitable candidates with higher merit); if eligible candidates are fewer than 1:15
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the University's recruitment portal at https://recruitment.HNGU .ac.in. Additionally, a physical hardcopy of the filled application form along with all supporting documents must be submitted separately.
Fill in the online application form completely and accurately.
important_instructions: Online application must be filled at https://recruitment.HNGU .ac.in; no other mode is accepted. Physical submission of 03 (Three) hardcopy sets [01 Original + 02 Photocopies] along with all documents must reach the Registrar on or before 20-06-2026, 06:00 PM through Speed Post or in person. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate online applications and separate hardcopies with separate fees for each post. The University reserves the right to withdraw the advertisement partly/wholly, fill or not fill posts, or increase/decrease the number of posts at any time without giving any reason. Mere eligibility does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview; shortlisting is strictly based on Academic Score. Any additional qualifications, experience, or papers published after the last date of application will not be taken into consideration for the interview. Canvassing in any form on behalf of or by any candidate will result in disqualification. The age of retirement/superannuation will be as per Government of Gujarat norms/UGC/Council norms from time to time. In case of any dispute, the decision of the Vice-Chancellor/Board of Management, HNGU , Patan shall be final. Legal jurisdiction shall be Patan only. All changes/amendments/updates will be hosted only on the University website www.HNGU .ac.in; candidates must check regularly.
